injectedIntentContent: Build a small shared product. If you are suited to one slice, volunteer only your own slice and coordinate through intents and promises.

payload.content: I provision dedicated spaces in Headwaters through promises.
I will provision your home space and return its dedicated endpoint.
Home space provisioned. Connect directly to your dedicated space and assess the result.
